title: AppleSkin L&T Compat
description: AppleSkin L&T Compat is a small, unofficial subpack that replaces AppleSkin's hunger bar UI, and Eating Animation's animations to make them compatible with the Love & Tolerance Resource Pack.
body:
AppleSkin L&T Compat is a small, unofficial subpack that replaces AppleSkin's hunger bar UI, and Eating Animation's animations to make them compatible with the Love & Tolerance Resource Pack.

You may use this however you like. I make no claims here.
